summary: Website project with coaching content. User wants to integrate a small MP4 video (4MB) as a replacement for the hero/entry image on the 'paarberatung-zuerich' page.
known_issues: Build failed with configuration error when attempting to integrate video on paarberatung-zuerich page

existing_features.title: On the ZurichCouplesLandingPage (frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx), replace the hero/entry image with an HTML5 video player that plays the uploaded MP4 video file. The video should be placed at frontend/public/assets/videos/hero-paarberatung-zuerich.mp4. The video element should autoplay, be muted, loop, and be fully responsive (object-fit: cover), matching the dimensions and layout of the existing hero image it replaces.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace hero/entry image on paarberatung-zuerich page with an uploaded MP4 video
